title: Grilled Australian Delicate Fish with Lime
description: A simple and flavorful recipe showcasing the delicate flavor of Australian fish paired with the brightness of lime.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Rinse the fish fillets under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the fish with salt and pepper to taste.
Drizzle the olive oil over the fish and make sure it's evenly coated.
Place the fish on the grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Remove the fish from the grill and let it rest for a few minutes.
Squeeze the lime juice over the fish and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve the fish with lemon wedges on the side, if desired.
